workspace.title: Workspace
workspace.deleteDescription: This action cannot be undone. All requests, folders, and environments will be deleted.
workspace.name: Workspace Name
workspace.activeNotFound: The active workspace was not found. Select a workspace from the header menu or report this bug to

environment.title: Environment
environment.newDescription: Create multiple environments with different sets of variables
environment.name: Name
environment.shareDescription: Sharable environments are included in data export and directory sync.
environment.colorDescription: Select a color to be displayed when this environment is active, to help identify it.
environment.plainTextSecretsWarning: This sharable environment contains plain-text secrets
environment.colorPickerDescription: This color will be used to color the interface when this environment is active
environment.multipleBaseWarning: There are multiple base environments for this workspace. Please delete the environments you no longer need.
environment.sharableTooltip: This environment will be included in Directory Sync and data exports

cookieJar.title: Cookie Jar
cookieJar.invalidExpiration: Cookie expiration must be a valid date.
cookieJar.empty: Cookies will appear when a response includes a Set-Cookie header.
cookieJar.noMatches: No cookies match the current filter.
cookieJar.invalidJarDescription: Failed to find cookie jar for ID: {{id}}

sync.directoryNotEmpty: Directory is not empty. Do you want to open it instead?
sync.title: Local directory sync
sync.description: Sync data to a folder for backup and Git integration.
sync.initializeGitDescription: Create a Git repository in the selected sync directory.
sync.filesChanged_one: {{count}} file in the directory has changed. Do you want to update your workspace?
sync.filesChanged_other: {{count}} files in the directory have changed. Do you want to update your workspace?

switchDialog.prompt: Where would you like to open {{name}}?

sidebar.restoreDescriptionOne: This will discard uncommitted changes for the selected item.
sidebar.restoreDescriptionMany: This will discard uncommitted changes for {{count}} selected items.

encryption.description: Encrypt workspace secrets and sensitive values at rest.
encryption.disableDescription: This will disable encryption for this workspace. Any previously encrypted values will fail to decrypt and will need to be re-entered manually. This action cannot be undone.
encryption.missingKey: This workspace contains encrypted values but no key is configured. Please enter the workspace key to access the encrypted data.
encryption.keyHelp: The following key is used for encryption operations within this workspace. It is stored securely using your OS keychain, but it is recommended to back it up. If you share this workspace with others, you'll need to send them this key to access any encrypted values.
encryption.helpEnable: Encrypt passwords, tokens, and other sensitive info when encryption is enabled.
encryption.helpSharing: Encrypted data remains secure when syncing to the filesystem or Git, and when exporting or sharing with others.

dns.descriptionBefore: Override DNS resolution for specific hostnames. This works like
dns.descriptionAfter: but only for requests made from this workspace.

export.includePrivateHelp: Environments marked as "sharable" will be exported by default

clone.authenticationFailed: Authentication failed. Please check your credentials and try again.
clone.hasSubdirectoryHelp: Enable if the Yaak workspace files are not at the root of the repository

git.restoreFileDescription: This will restore the file to the selected commit.
git.selectCommitDiff: Select a commit to view diff
git.discardDescription: Do you really want to discard uncommitted changes for the selected item?
git.selectChangeDiff: Select a change to view diff
git.conflictsDescription: Your branch has conflicts. Either make a commit or force checkout to discard changes.
git.resetDescription: This will discard all uncommitted changes. This cannot be undone.
git.deleteAnyway: Do you want to delete it anyway?
git.syncDescription: When enabled, workspace data syncs to the chosen folder as text files, ideal for backup and Git collaboration.
git.hideSetupDescription: You can configure filesystem sync or Git in the workspace settings.
git.initializeDescription: Initialize local repo to start versioning with Git
git.hideGitDescription: You can initialize a Git repo outside of Yaak to bring this back.
git.author: Author
git.githubUsernameHelp: Use your GitHub username (not your email).
git.githubTokenHelp: GitHub requires a Personal Access Token (PAT) for write operations over HTTPS. Passwords are not supported.
git.passwordTokenHelp: Enter your password or access token for this Git server.
git.divergedFrom: Your local branch has diverged from
git.resolvePrompt: . How would you like to resolve this?
git.mergeCommitDescription: Combine local and remote changes into a single merge commit
git.forcePullDescription: Discard local commits and reset to match the remote branch
git.uncommittedDescription: You have uncommitted changes. Commit or reset your changes before pulling.
